ALAN S. YEE, Esq., of SIEGEL, YEE, BRUNNER & MEHTA, (510) 839-1200, for Plaintiff.
DANIA M. BAKER, Esq., of ALVARENGA LAW, (408) 289-1701, for Defendant.

Both counsel stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. Counsel and the Judge Pro Tem (all appearing remotely) authorize the Clerk to execute the formal stipulation on their behalf.

The matter is argued, at conclusion of argument, the subject matter is taken under submission.
